title: 3 Picks from the Recovering Internet Software & Services Industry
text: The Internet-Software & Services industry is in recovery mode even as a slowing economy in 2023 looms large. NTES, RNG and VRSN are better equipped than others to come out on top.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Consider Buying VeriSign (VRSN)
text: VeriSign (VRSN) is benefiting from growth in .com and .net domain name registrations.

title: Verisign Stock Has Underperformed Despite Steady Sales Growth – Here's Why
text: Verisign Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN) stock price has gained 31% from around $148 at 2018 end to $193 currently, primarily due to favorable changes in its revenues and P/S multiple.
